---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new behavior, skin, or feature for Mango
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like Mango to do?**
A clear description of the idea (a new motion, a color skin, a setting, etc.).

**Why would it be fun or useful?**

**Any references**
Links, sketches, or examples of the behavior/look you have in mind.
